popularStory.headline: Ida of Austria
popularStory.description: According to Crusader legend, Zengi's mother was Ida of Austria (mother of Leopold III of Austria), who had supposedly been captured during the Crusade of 1101 and placed in a harem.

zh.lifeSummary: Ida Markgräfin von Österreich於1053年出生在可特格希 貝也。她於1069年與Leopold II. Babenberger Markgraf von Österreich在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 陳結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1101年9月在白展丁 艾皮爾享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Ida Markgräfin von Österreich于1053年出生在可特格希 貝也。她于1069年与Leopold II. Babenberger Markgraf von Österreich在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 陳结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1101年9月在白展丁 艾皮爾享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ida
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Norman name, of Germanic origin, derived from īd ‘work’. This died out during the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, influenced by its use in Tennyson's The Princess ( 1847 ) for the central character, who devotes herself to the cause of women's rights and women's education in a thoroughly Victorian way. The name is also associated with Mount Ida in Crete, which was connected in classical times with the worship of Zeus, king of the gods, who was supposed to have been brought up in a cave on the mountainside. In the 1930s it became famous as the name of the film star Ida Lupino ( 1914–1995 ).

en.lifeSummary: Ida Markgräfin von Österreich was born in 1053, in Bavaria. She married Leopold II. Babenberger Markgraf von Österreich in 1069, in Cham, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 7 daughters. She died in September 1101, in Byzantine Empire, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Ida Markgräfin von Österreich est née en 1053, à Königreich Bayern. Elle a épousé Leopold II. Babenberger Markgraf von Österreich en 1069, à Landkreis Cham, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée en septembre 1101, à Empire byzantin, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Ida Markgräfin von Österreich wurde 1053 in Königreich Bayern geboren. Sie hat 1069 in Landkreis Cham, Bayern, Deutschland Leopold II. Babenberger Markgraf von Österreich geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 7 Töchter. Sie starb im September 1101 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Byzantinisches Reich.

it.lifeSummary: Ida Markgräfin von Österreich è nata il nel 1053 nel Königreich Bayern. Lei sposato Leopold II. Babenberger Markgraf von Österreich nel 1069, nel Landkreis Cham, Bayern, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 7 figlie. Morì nel settembre 1101, nel Impero bizantino, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ida Markgräfin von Österreichは1053年にクoニグレイチ バイエルンで生まれた。1069年にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス チャムでLeopold II. Babenberger Markgraf von Österreichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1101年9月に東ローマ帝国で48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ida Markgräfin von Österreich(은)는 1053년 ko니그레이치 베이른에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1069년 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 챔에서 Leopold II. Babenberger Markgraf von Österreich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1101년 9월 비자틴 피르에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Ida Markgräfin von Österreich родилась в 1053 г. в местности кoниграич беиирн. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Leopold II. Babenberger Markgraf von Österreich в 1069 г. в местности ландкрис чам, беиирн, Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 7 дочерей. Она умерла сентябрь 1101 г. в местности Византийская империя в возрасте 48 лет.

Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 7 hijas. Murió en septiembre de 1101, en Imperio bizantino, a la edad de 48 años.
